hero.title: Professional AI Visual Solutions
hero.subtitle: Image Suite Generation · Style Replication · Detail-Page Production · Commercial Retouching, all in one workflow for faster e-commerce output.
hero.platformHint: Compatible with 30+ mainstream domestic and global e-commerce style and size standards.

smart.title: Smart / Replicated Generation
smart.desc: Upload one flatlay image and let AI generate multi-angle outputs with precise style replication. Produce listing covers and detail visuals in batch for Tmall, JD, and Amazon formats.

batch.title: Batch Generation
batch.desc: Support bulk uploads and one-click generation for multi-angle, multi-background clothing detail visuals. Accelerate large-scale output while matching mainstream marketplace requirements.

detail.title: Clothing Detail Suite
detail.desc: Auto-produce complete fashion detail sets including flatlay, model shots, zoomed texture close-ups, and lifestyle scenes. Export ready-to-use layouts for Pinduoduo, Douyin, Xiaohongshu, and Taobao ratios.

bottomCta.title: Help Brands Boost Shooting & Retouching Efficiency by 10x

genesis.title: Studio Genesis
genesis.description: One Shot, A Complete Visual Ecosystem. Architect your entire product gallery in seconds.
genesis.designBriefPlaceholder: Describe your product's USP and desired aesthetic
genesis.emptyState: Upload your product photo and fill the brief. Click 'Analyze & Blueprint' to start.
genesis.planPreviewDesc: Review the proposed scene logic and asset distribution.
genesis.designSpecsDesc: Universal visual standards for all images
genesis.imagePlanCount: {count} images total, click to edit title or description
genesis.allImagesFailed: All images failed to generate. Please check your settings and try again.

aestheticMirror.title: Style Replicate
aestheticMirror.description: Upload a reference image and product assets to replicate the visual style in one click.
aestheticMirror.heroTitle: One-Click Replication of High-Converting Detail Page Styles
aestheticMirror.heroDescription: Upload your preferred design references and product assets. AI intelligently blends style language and product traits to generate conversion-focused detail visuals.
aestheticMirror.referenceCardDesc: Upload a reference image with a clear visual style
aestheticMirror.productDropHint: Upload product elements you want to appear in the output image
aestheticMirror.firstImageHint: Only the first product image is used for generation in this version
aestheticMirror.promptDesc: Fill this optionally, or generate directly
aestheticMirror.promptPlaceholder: Example: Add a limited-offer sticker, with soft low-saturation lighting...
aestheticMirror.referenceUploadHint: or click to choose file (PNG, JPG)
aestheticMirror.batchSingleProductHint: Batch replicate supports exactly one product image.
aestheticMirror.noResultError: No output image returned. Please try again.

featureA.title: Intelligent Style Fusion
featureA.desc: AI extracts and reproduces the design language and visual style of your references.

featureB.title: Product Trait Preservation
featureB.desc: Preserves key product details and selling points while transferring style.

featureC.title: One-Click Generate & Export
featureC.desc: Generate high-resolution visuals quickly and export in multiple sizes.

clothingStudio.title: Clothing Studio
clothingStudio.description: Generate three professional clothing variants from a single product image.

refinementStudio.title: One-Click Smart Product Refinement
refinementStudio.description: Upload product images and let AI analyze quality, remove blemishes, and enhance details for more professional product visuals.
refinementStudio.resultSubtitle: View refinement results after uploading product images
refinementStudio.uploadDropLabel: Click to upload or drag images here
refinementStudio.uploadDropMeta: Supports JPG and PNG formats, up to 50 images
refinementStudio.uploadSupportHint: Supports JPG and PNG, up to 50 images
refinementStudio.uploadLimitHint: Supports JPG and PNG, up to 50 images
refinementStudio.uploadInvalidFormat: Only JPG and PNG are supported, and each image must be <= 10MB
refinementStudio.uploadLimitReached: You can upload up to 50 images
refinementStudio.requirementsSubtitle: Describe special requirements for image refinement (optional)
refinementStudio.requirementsExample: e.g. Remove background clutter, enhance product gloss, fix scratches, remove text in image, improve overall clarity...
refinementStudio.waiting: Upload product images to view refinement results
refinementStudio.waitingActionHint: Click the left-side "Start One-Click Refinement" button
